title: Cleisostoma sagittiforme
taxonomy: Cleisostoma sagittiforme is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Cleisostoma. This genus is part of the subtribe Cleistinae and tribe Vandeae, which are both within the family Orchidaceae. Further classification places Cleisostoma within the family Orchidaceae, order Asparagales, and class Liliopsida. Cleisostoma sagittiforme is a part of the kingdom Plantae. The classification highlights the plant's relationship to other orchids within its family.
